top_signals.title: Oil Rises With Dollar After US Strikes on Iran: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Oil prices rose and the dollar advanced as investors assessed the implications of renewed geopolitical tensions for energy supplies and risk assets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: A Catholic Security Scholar’s Case for Responsible Military AI
top_signals.summary:
What do you do when two identities that make up your deepest self find themselves on opposite sides of a moral and spiritual battlefield?I am Catholic. I have been one for over 20 years since I made the life-altering decision to join a friend for Mass one day. My faith became a spiritual and ethical foundation at a time I sorely needed it, so much so that for a time, I contemplated entering the priesthood, which replaced my previous career goal of entering the CIA. I eventually realized that teaching was my true calling and decided to pursue that path

The post A Catholic Security Scholar’s Case for Responsible Military AI appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Indonesia Faces Possible Cut to Frontier Market by S&P Dow Jones
top_signals.summary: Indonesia’s efforts to reassure global investors suffered another setback after S&P Dow Jones Indices signaled the country could eventually lose its emerging-market status if concerns over its stock market persist.

top_signals.title: Toyota-backed Chinese self-driving unicorn Momenta hits Hong Kong market
